title: Soggs Pak
description: Fresh Animations meets Better Combat in a fresh new Vanilla+ mod featuring many animation and weapon packs to make a clean and fluid Minecraft experience
body:
A Simple Vanilla+ modpack centered around [FreshLX](https://modrinth.com/user/FreshLX)'s [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) resource pack and [ZsoltMolnarrr](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr)'s [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) mod. This project was desinged for me and a small group of friends, but who am I to stop people who enjoy the Van+ experience.

### **NOTE**, 
as of 1.2b.s1 there are two different first person models, so research [First-person Model](https://modrinth.com/mod/first-person-model) and 
[Hold My Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/hold-my-items) and choose one to keep enabled before launching the game
